reviews.review_title: So much potential! Keep it up!
reviews.review_description:
LOVE the concept behind Alcove’s apps. Set my older mother up with a VR headset and she’s over the moon to have her own space where she can watch family videos, put up pictures, and play around with different experiences. 

Sanctuary seems like it’s gearing up to be all this and more! Lovely environment, ability to upload videos and pictures, and multiplayer options as well. My only complaint with the apps is that neither are finished and both have bugs that need working out.

Some photos glitch in Sanctuary, but that’s to be expected since it’s Early Access. My real wish is that we had more of the same content from Alcove available, but upgraded! The AARP puzzles looked so amazing in the original game, but unfortunately we can’t buy the full pack yet. I’d love to see some of the same games being ported for Sanctuary, so that I can watch home movies with my family as we play games together. It would also be awesome if the environment changed from day to night in realtime.

Overall this app has SO much promise! I’m excited to see where it goes, and I’m even considering purchasing the membership for a month to see those AI features. All in all I love where these apps are heading, and I hope to see more family-centric goodness in the future!

Beautiful non working environment .. uploaded pics to the frames .. they would glitch and show double .. also it would be nice if you could move around freely .. instead of teleporting from place to place .. the tv screen doesn't work .. hope it gets fixed soon .. it has visual potential

The app misunderstood what I said when answering a basic question. There was no option to go back or resolve the issue. My attempts to correct the app’s mistake only made the situation much worse. This was a simple voice recognition error that rendered the app unusable.

Looks really nice but for $20 a month that little AI guy better come and clean my real house!
I would’ve considered $10 or 15 for a lifetime… but this monthly stuff is getting ridiculous.
I should add, I’ve always loved Alcove… even back to the Go. I’ve set up an account and bought the in App purchases. I support developers, but I don’t pay monthly fees to play games. And this is just way too pricey.

I was looking forward to this as I like their original app but the main video screen when you enter doesn’t work and I checked out the whole space and there’s literally nothing to do! Nothing to click on, nothing to see, I went upstairs, back down… Meh scenery,not as nice as their other app. There was no “Nova” character, no AI, nothing to click on, no travel, just a non-working video screen. I hope they fix this and I’ll update my review.

This is the perfect tranquil space. I have some ideas I want to try out but it could very well suit the dream situation for Quest I’ve been hoping for. For some reason, I’m not able to create an account, I keep getting an error message that says “Check your details.” or something similar.

It's super cute.  Great idea. It's also very glitchy and kicks me out after a while saying I don't have enough memory to run it. (I'm on quest 3 ) 🤷.  I would no way buy a subscription to this game or any game)  If it worked like it should sure I would buy it if the price was right but monthly fee?  No thank you.

developer_response.body:
Sorry for the issues. We've recently pushed an update that should resolve the memory crash. Keep in mind we're in early access as we polish and take in feedback. Additionally, the subscription is completely optional. It's there to support the development team and provide access to certain services which cost us to operate and maintain.

If you encounter any other issues, don't hesitate to reach out to support@alcove.com.

reviews.review_description: Everything looks and works works  great. The sculpture button is pretty cool. As far as I can tell you have the same videos as the free alcove app. Am I missing  something.

reviews.review_title: Good old Alcove with new potential
reviews.review_description:
Here you get most all the features of Alcove along with some brand new ones. The AI helper and creator has a lot of potential. As well as the integration of travelling around the world using Google street map images.

The subscription is a bit pricey for now imo. Will only try a month to see where the app goes.

Love the new appartement! Keep up the great work
